title: Disabled Veteran Property Tax Exclusion
summary: Property tax exclusion for qualifying disabled veterans and surviving spouses in North Carolina.

requirements.notes: Excludes the first $45,000 of appraised value of the primary residence.

eligibilityNotes: Applies to veterans rated 100% service-connected and totally disabled by the VA, or qualifying surviving spouses. Apply through the county tax assessor.

title: Motor Vehicle Property Tax Exemption (Disabled Veteran)
summary: Property tax exemption on one motor vehicle owned by a qualifying disabled veteran.

requirements.notes: Applies to one vehicle owned and registered by the veteran.

eligibilityNotes: Must be rated 100% service-connected and totally disabled. Apply through the county tax office.

title: Disabled Veteran Lifetime Hunting & Fishing License
summary: Free lifetime hunting and fishing licenses for qualifying disabled veterans.

requirements.notes: Veteran must be a North Carolina resident.

eligibilityNotes: Available to veterans with a service-connected disability of 50% or greater. Issued through the NC Wildlife Resources Commission.

title: North Carolina State Parks – Disabled Veteran Benefits
summary: Reduced or waived fees for camping and park access for qualifying disabled veterans.

requirements.notes: Discounts vary by park and facility.

eligibilityNotes: Available to veterans rated 100% service-connected and totally disabled. Proof required at time of reservation or check-in.

title: North Carolina Veterans Employment Preference
summary: Employment preference for veterans applying for state government positions.

requirements.notes: Disabled veterans may receive additional preference.

eligibilityNotes: Applies to qualifying veterans seeking North Carolina state employment. Documentation such as DD-214 required.

title: Veteran Designation on NC Driver License / ID
summary: Veterans may add a Veteran designation to a North Carolina driver license or ID card.

requirements.notes: Requires verification of veteran status through the NC Division of Veterans Affairs.

eligibilityNotes: Veterans must obtain verification from NCDVA before visiting the DMV.

title: North Carolina State Veterans Homes
summary: Long-term skilled nursing care facilities for eligible veterans.

requirements.notes: Admission depends on medical need, eligibility, and bed availability.

eligibilityNotes: Applicants must meet VA and state eligibility criteria. Homes are located in multiple regions of North Carolina.

title: North Carolina State Veterans Cemeteries
summary: State-operated veterans cemeteries providing burial benefits for eligible veterans and family members.

requirements.notes: Eligibility generally aligns with VA national cemetery rules.

eligibilityNotes: Includes multiple cemetery locations throughout North Carolina. Pre-need eligibility determination is recommended.
